title: The Actor That Got Chased Around the City
original_title: The Actor That Got Chased Around the City
overview: Actor Nathan Minors is at the top of his career, and Minors and his fiancé Faith celebrate with a night out in the town. Things take an ugly turn when Minors receives a text message on the ride home that will forever change his life.
